Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wei Jin Sairus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Jin Sairus is the Wei Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Jin Sairus wears a jade scepter badge with the White Fox emblem on his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Wei Jin Sairus is a Ruler on the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Wei Jin Sairus is the grandfather of Wei Jin Amon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Wei Jin Sairus's body dissolved into foxfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Patriarch Sairus awarded Kelsa a jade badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Wei Jin Sairus suggested Lindon could remove himself from the stage without dishonor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Wei Jin Sairus is a high-status individual in the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Patriarch Sairus can warp the air around him.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
